case_title: JAS DHILLON VS. AVENUE BODY SHOP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JAS DHILLON AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE NOE FLORES, SR., OWNER/PRESIDENT OF AVENUE BODY SHOP. NOE FLORES, JR., A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT AND MANAGER AT AVENUE BODY SHOP, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DHILLON, JAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVENUE BODY SHOP $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,577.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO JAS DHILLON ON 08/22/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
